title: Notification No.08/2016-Cus(NT), dated 12.01.2016
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue (Central Board of Excise and Customs) Notification No. 08/2016-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 12th January, 2016 S.O. (E). -In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Additional Director General (Adjudication), Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, New Delhi to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on - (i) the Principal Commissioner of Customs (Import), Inland Container Depot, Tughlakabad, New Delhi; (ii) the Deputy./Assistant Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container Depot, Patparganj, New Delhi; (iii) the Additional /Joint commissioner of Customs, Ludhiana, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s. Balaji Enterprises, 2281, Ist floor, Hudson Line, Kingsway Camp, Delhi, and others issued vide Show Cause Notice number 23/66/2013-DZU/2114, dated the 17th April, 2015 by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Delhi Zonal Unit, Delhi [F No.437/45/2015-Cus.IV] (Z. R. Kamili) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
